title: Hans - Brazilian Dental Benefits Platform
problem: Dental care in Brazil is expensive and not well-covered by traditional health insurance. Companies want to offer dental benefits but administrative burden is high. Dentists struggle with patient acquisition and insurance claims.
solution: Dental benefits platform for employers. Employees get access to dental network at discounted rates. Dentists get patient volume in exchange for accepting reduced fees. Platform handles all claims and payments.
technology: Benefits management platform, dentist network management, claims processing, employee mobile app
varden_fit: MONITOR - Adjacent space (dental vs medical). Infrastructure they build (benefits admin, claims) could be applicable to medical. Potential partnership or acquisition target.
notes: Dental benefits admin is even more boring than medical. But profitable niche. Brazil has 300K+ dentists. Hans model could extend to other specialties.
